title: Marketplace Manager - Vision Express India - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Vision Express India - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Join the Vision Express India family as a Marketplace Manager in Chennai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Vision Express India:
Vision Express India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vision Express India!
